headlines.title: Tulsi Gabbard to resign as director of national intelligence
headlines.description: Tulsi Gabbard, the top-ranking U.S. intelligence official, told President Donald Trump in a letter on Friday that she is resigning from her role following her husband’s cancer diagnosis

headlines.title: Republicans Cancel Votes Amid Trump’s ‘Anti-Weaponization’ Fund
headlines.description: There is mounting frustration among some Republicans over President Donald Trump’s proposed spending, leading to both his $1 billion ballroom and the nearly $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund hitting unexpected walls within the party. Objections over the latter fund prompted Republican senators to postpone a vote on an immigration bill and leave Capitol Hill for the week, according to two GOP sources. NBC’s Kelly O’Donnell reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Trump tells Kevin Warsh to 'do your own thing' as Federal Reserve chair
headlines.description: During a swearing-in ceremony at the White House, President Trump encouraged Kevin Warsh to be "totally independent" and encouraged him to "do your own thing" as the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

headlines.title: Years of ignored warnings freed a children’s pastor to sexually abuse girls, lawsuit says
headlines.description: Long before Tony Waller, an Assemblies of God pastor, was convicted of raping girls, children told church leaders about hidden cameras, drugged drinks and abuse, a lawsuit says.

headlines.title: Watch highlights from Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' finale
headlines.description: Watch highlights of the star-studded sendoff as Stephen Colbert brings the curtain down on 33 years of “The Late Show,” with legends like Jon Stewart, Paul McCartney, Bryan Cranston, and many surprises.

headlines.title: Trump administration says visa holders seeking green cards must apply in home countries, in major change
headlines.description: The Trump administration said Friday that people with temporary visas seeking to adjust their immigration status to obtain green cards must return to their home countries to “do so through consular processing,” in a major change from current practice.

headlines.title: Nation’s largest public pension fund plagued by secrecy and underperformance, probe finds
headlines.description: An independent investigation into the nation’s largest public pension, the California Public Employees’ Retirement System, has been completed.

headlines.title: NASCAR star Kyle Busch dead at age 41
headlines.description: He was among the most winning drivers in NASCAR history and now the sudden death of Kyle Busch has left the racing world stunned. NBC News’ Sam Brock reports on what both NASCAR and Busch’s family have revealed about his death.

headlines.title: The 93+ absolute best Memorial Day sales worth shopping
headlines.description: Shop the best Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

headlines.title: SpaceX launches prototype of Starship rocket in crucial test flight
headlines.description: Watch live coverage as SpaceX launches the twelfth test flight of Starship. The company claims the third-generation prototype, dubbed V3, is larger, more powerful and a step closer to being fully reusable. The rocket is scheduled to liftoff from SpaceX's StarBase in Brownsville, Texas.

headlines.title: Pilots and astronauts detail unexplained aerial encounters in declassified UFO files
headlines.description: Pilots and astronauts detail unexplained aerial encounters in declassified UFO files

headlines.title: Lupita Nyong’o shrugs off racist ‘Odyssey’ backlash over Helen of Troy casting
headlines.description: Oscar winner Lupita Nyong’o said she’s losing no sleep over racist criticism of her casting as Helen of Troy, the mythic beauty whose face “launched a thousand ships” and ignited the Trojan War
